svg.title: Operations reports printing workflow
svg.desc: **Process.** The printing process for kitchen, housekeeping, in-house, manual sales/liquor-charge list, and cancellation report actions. It supports printing for a chosen date or date range where applicable.

g.text: Kitchen selected — choose dates at right.
Range applies where supported. Cancellations use
Tip: for the full morning run, use Batch print on the Print Menu — this screen is for a single report or a re-run.
